ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld endgame mod built around controlled summoning, ritual infrastructure, hostile abyssal encounters, and boss-driven reward progression.
Build the Abyssal Summoning Circle, prepare sigils and residue, trigger controlled encounters, survive elites and bosses, and convert the spoils into stronger weapons, implants, and deeper infernal-tech access.
Current alpha features include custom summoning and forge infrastructure, bespoke abyssal UI, residue/sigil progression, hostile manifestations, multiple abyssal enemy types, miniboss and boss content, custom weapons and implants, VFX/audio support, and EN/RU localization.
Early Alpha: bugs, balance swings, and rough edges are still possible.
